message:
feat(sec72): add 45 graduated enforcement rollout tests + make RolloutTracker public (bd-8lppo)

Tests cover: phase ordering/serde, advance/rollback state transitions,
false-positive/error-rate/latency rollback triggers, window statistics,
operator overrides, full lifecycle scenarios, threshold edge cases.
Also makes RolloutTracker pub for integration testing, adds SEC-7.2 to
traceability matrix (17 beads total), and classifies new test files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
